(G1FB) Locomotion off Unit Support Provided CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: locomotion off unit - ADL support provided. "-" = Unknown, 0 = No setup or physical help from staff, 1 = Setup help only, 2 = One person physical assist, 3 = Two+ person physical assist, 8 = ADL activity itself did not occur during entire 7 days
218 G1GA G1GA_SELF_DRESS (G1GA) Dressing Self Performance CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: dressing - ADL self-performance "-" =
